channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump’s Comments on Iran Uranium Undermine U.S. Negotiation Position
item.description: During a recent interview on Fox News with Sean Hannity, President Donald Trump made statements regarding the U.S. approach to Iran's nuclear program that could weaken his negotiating leverage. Trump ...

item.title: Son of Telangana Union Minister Arrested Under POCSO; High Court Denies Interim Protection
item.description: Bandi Bhageerath, son of Union Minister Bandi Sanjay Kumar, surrendered to the police in Telangana on Saturday evening following the High Court’s refusal to grant interim protection from arrest in a P...

item.title: Union Minister Bandi Sanjay Kumar addresses family distress after son arrested in POCSO case
item.description: Union Minister of State for Home Affairs, Bandi Sanjay Kumar, on Saturday broke his silence after his son, Bandi Sai Bhageerath, became involved in a POCSO case investigation. In a post on X, Kumar ex...

item.title: Israeli airstrike kills senior Hamas commander linked to October 7 attacks
item.description: An Israeli airstrike in Gaza on Friday killed Izz al-Din al-Haddad, a senior commander in Hamas' military wing and one of the last surviving planners of the October 7, 2023 attacks that killed approxi...

item.title: F4 and Mayday's Ashin Announce Joint Concert in Manila on June 27
item.description: Fans of Asian pop and rock music have something exciting to look forward to as members of the iconic Taiwanese boy band F4 and Ashin, the lead vocalist of the renowned Taiwanese rock band Mayday, are ...

item.title: Senate rules $1 billion White House ballroom funding cannot be included in spending bill
item.description: The Senate parliamentarian has determined that a proposal to allocate $1 billion for White House security, including funding for President Donald Trump’s planned 90,000-square-foot ballroom, cannot be...

item.title: WBC President Mauricio Sulaimán explores hosting SA boxing events and convention
item.description: Mauricio Sulaimán, president of the World Boxing Council (WBC), has indicated that South Africa could potentially host the WBC's annual convention this year, though the 2026 event is currently schedul...

item.title: Police Shoot Dead Two Suspected Gangsters in Transmara South, One Injured
item.description: In Transmara South, Narok County, police gunned down two suspected gangsters, Kipkorir Kirui and Risky, who were allegedly behind repeated armed robberies and violent attacks in the region. The suspec...

item.title: Pateros Alfombra: The Decline and Survival of a Local Footwear Tradition
item.description: Pateros, a small municipality in Metro Manila, is known for its historic alfombra slippers, a traditional handcrafted footwear that reached peak popularity in the 1980s and 1990s. Once home to hundred...

item.title: Two men charged after doctor shot during VIP security convoy incident in Sandton
item.description: Johannesburg authorities have charged two men following a road-rage incident involving a VIP security convoy on the M1 near Sandton. Dr Michael Jeff, a 30-year-old doctor, was reportedly shot in the l...

item.title: Anmol Pinky alleges coercion during custody and questions police arrest timeline
item.description: KARACHI: Anmol Pinky, a suspected drug network operator, appeared in various courts on Saturday, contesting police claims about her arrest date. Authorities had said she was arrested on May 12 in Kara...

item.title: India Declares Arbitration Award on Indus Waters Treaty as Invalid
item.description: India’s Ministry of External Affairs on Saturday firmly rejected a recent arbitration award concerning the maximum pondage at Indian hydroelectric projects on the Indus river system, declaring it null...

item.title: Nigerian and US forces confirm killing of ISWAP leader Abubakar Mainok after intelligence operation
item.description: The Nigerian military, working with US Africa Command (AFRICOM), don finally confirm say dem don kill Abubakar Mainok, senior commander of Islamic State West Africa Province (ISWAP), for Metele, Borno...

item.title: Czechmate Quartet Impresses with Masterful Baroque Performance
item.description: The Czechmate Quartet recently performed a program of Baroque compositions that showcased their technical skill and interpretive sensitivity. The ensemble delivered a nuanced performance, highlighting...

item.title: Bato dela Rosa Evades ICC Arrest During Senate Chaos
item.description: On May 11, 2026, Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa, former police chief under Rodrigo Duterte, made a dramatic appearance in the Senate amid a political upheaval. After months of staying out of the publ...

item.title: APC Reps Primaries in Ondo See Smooth Polls in Some Areas, But Controversy Hits Okitipupa/Irele
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) held rescheduled primaries for the House of Representatives seats in Ondo State on Saturday, May 17, 2026. Reactions from party aspirants dey mixed. For Akure South...

item.title: Manchester City Wins FA Cup and Secures Major Prize Money
item.description: Manchester City clinched their 8th Emirates FA Cup title with a narrow win over Chelsea at Wembley Stadium, adding another trophy to their already impressive season. This victory strengthens City's pu...

item.title: Ramaphosa Fires Tolashe Amid Ongoing Political Challenges
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has finally taken decisive action by dismissing Social Development Minister Sisisi Tolashe following multiple allegations of misconduct. Reports revealed that Tolashe misused...

item.title: RAF to deploy cost-effective precision missiles to counter Iranian drones
item.description: The Royal Air Force (RAF) will soon equip its Typhoon jets in the Middle East with the Advanced Precision Kill Weapon System (APKWS), a move aimed at intercepting Iranian drones more efficiently and e...

item.title: Sally Motlana: Detention, Defiance, and the Fight Against Apartheid
item.description: This extract from 'Faith & Defiance: The Life of Sally Motlana' by Mukoni Ratshitanga chronicles the life and struggles of veteran South African activist Sally Motlana, who passed away in 2023 at age ...
